42d826e5f4e538e35789991d63adcea25b4d33e7.raw: {"summary":"The email campaign sent 9,134 emails with a delivery rate of 99.2%, achieving an open rate of 25.0% and a unique click-through rate of 2.16%. From the 2,631 opens, 194 clicks were recorded, indicating moderate engagement. Landing pages received 510 views from 363 active users, with an average engagement time of 26 seconds. Social media efforts on LinkedIn generated 36 impressions, 3 engagements, and 2 clicks. Registrations were low, with only 2 recorded and no attendance data available. Survey responses totaled 23, with an average satisfaction rating of 4.35 out of 5, though no consultation leads were generated."}

886efa85dedf1fc54728480f79ef4edc607b1ded.raw: {"summary":"The email campaign sent 9,134 emails with a delivery rate of 99.2%, achieving an open rate of 25.0% and a click-through rate of 2.16%. From the 2,631 opens, 194 clicks were recorded, indicating solid engagement. Landing pages received 510 views from 363 active users, averaging 1.4 views per user with an engagement time of 26 seconds. Social media activity on LinkedIn showed 36 impressions, 3 engagements, and 2 clicks. Registrations were low at 2, but attendance was high at 71, suggesting strong event participation. Survey responses totaled 23 with an average rating of 4.35, though no consultation leads were generated."}
